cause_analysis.narrative: Escape Day Spa churned on 2026-03-18 after 154 days with Zoca. Conversation collapsed into a 29-day silence starting 2025-12-25. Classification: explicit cancellation. The client formally asked to cancel; the question is whether a save attempt was made.
recommendations: [Retention] Cancellation was signalled 24 day(s) before churn via app_chat. Trigger an AM save call within 4 hours of any cancellation keyword — not a support response.
[Offer] Build a 3-tier retention offer ladder (pause / discount / scope change) so AMs have something concrete to counter with.

messages.body: I'm sorry we couldn't get to the phone right now. If you're calling during business hours, we must be helping your customer.
Hi there

Yes, all location accounts have been successfully cancelled. We are sorry to see you go and we appreciate the time you gave us. Wishing you all the best ahead. You are always welcome back if you ever need us!
